intro: Coronilla balansae, also known as Balansa clover, is a perennial legume species native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and Eastern Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include its potential to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The bioactive constituents of Coronilla balansae include flavonoids, isoflavones, and coumarins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
